patient_input: I have all the symptoms except fever. I went to the doctor and she gave me antibiotics klacid xl 500mg. I'm worried it will make my immune system bad.
Traveled 2 weeks ago from FL to PA. 68-year-old female. Has had fever of 100, chills at night and some coughing for 5 days. Tested negative for flu and x-rays were clear.
My 19-year-old son was diagnosed with pneumonia 5 months ago and given antibiotics but with minimal results. He still has a deep cough and low energy. He refuses to go back to the doctor.
Me and my 7-year-old have flu-like symptoms and have been in contact with someone who arrived from overseas with an undiagnosed heavy flu.
Last night I just started getting fluey. My nose got really runny and continued to today. I've also started getting a slight headache.
I have a slight cough over the last few days but haven't been exposed to anyone. I recently quit smoking so could that be it.
Daughter is experiencing dry coughing and nasal drip. She was on amoxicillin for ear infection. We travelled back from Cape Town last week.
Good morning, I have a sore throat for 2 days now. This morning my throat was a little better but I have a stuffy nose and body aches.
My throat is extremely scratchy and red inside. I'm very short of breath. Even as an asthmatic I have to use my inhalers more than usual and have nebulized 3 times in the last 24 hours.
My husband has a chest infection — a small pocket of pneumonia in his left lobe. He is coughing up large long blood clots and also through his nose when blowing.
I have a severe headache, tingling head and nose, pain in lower chest and chills. I'm a heavy smoker and drink daily. No fever but I feel very lightheaded and had diarrhea.
Diagnosed with type B flu on Sunday, getting worse even with meds. Now I have rattling breathing, cough, slight fever, chest hurts, very weak, no appetite. Almost 33 weeks pregnant.
I am an asthmatic but rarely need my inhaler. With health services possibly overwhelmed, what drugs can I take if inhalers don't work?
I have type 1 diabetes that I struggle to control. I'm in a panic about getting a viral infection.
I use Athraway chronic for rheumatoid arthritis.
Last year during flu season I had a severe cough, difficulty breathing and x-ray showed fluid in my chest/lungs.
I have pneumonia. My doctor has me on antibiotics and albuterol. Yesterday after a treatment I spat up fresh blood. I'm on blood thinners.
My son started with a very sore throat last night and I can't seem to get his fever under control. It spread through the house very quickly.
I think I have Covid-19. I have difficulty breathing, shortness of breath, tightness in chest, sore throat and light fever. Symptoms have been progressing for 4 days. I had diarrhea 2 days ago.
Do I have coronavirus? I have joint pains in neck, shoulder, elbow and wrist. I did sleep most of the day yesterday so I might have been in an uncomfortable position.
I have had a sore throat and shortness of breath, tight chest since last Monday. 8 days later and symptoms are not going away. No runny nose. I have been exposed to travelers.
My boyfriend has strep pneumonia. X-ray showed it's getting worse and spread to his left lung. Culture showed staph in his lungs.
I have a dizzy head and some phlegm. Need to check symptoms.
I am experiencing a sore throat, fever, headache and coughing. I have a bit of a runny nose, occasional shortness of breath. I have traveled on a cruise recently.
Body ache and fever, scratchy itchy throat.

About 6 weeks ago I was diagnosed with PE in right lung and pneumonia in the left lung. I was in the hospital for 9 days. Now I have lower back pain and pain between my shoulder blades. It hurts to breathe, swallow and move.
I've had a cold since March 13. I have since started coughing and don't seem to be recovering. One day fine, next day terrible. Lots of tight phlegm and very sore throat.
I have some suspected molluscum on most of my stomach. It's itchy, inflamed, sensitive, and spreading. Why is it peeling so much?
My mom is 65. She was in ICU for pneumonia. She developed water in her lungs, kidney and liver failure, and infection in her muscles. She can't walk, talk and struggles to breathe.

expected_entities.functionalLimitation: unable to walk, unable to talk, difficulty breathing

patient_input: I recently visited a client whose husband works with a confirmed COVID case. Two days after I fell ill with sore throat, fever and feeling tired.
Can sinusitis cause white spots on tonsils?
Experiencing pain and swelling accompanied by warmth to the touch with a red patch around my elbow. Also experiencing body aches.
My COPD meds are finishing in the next week and I can't get in to see my pulmonologist.
Diagnosed with pneumonia 9 days ago. 1 day good, 1 day bad. Now I have a runny nose and still have a tickle. I'm a singer.
I have a sore throat for almost a week now. I tried gargling with warm water and apple cider vinegar. Now I still have a sore throat and burning in my chest.
I have chest pain that radiates to my left arm. It started 20 minutes ago and the pain is 9 out of 10.
I ate peanuts 10 minutes ago and my throat is swelling up. I can feel my airway closing and I have hives all over my body.
I fell while playing football 30 minutes ago. My ankle hurts badly and I cannot walk properly. There is swelling and bruising.
I fell and hit my head on the pavement. I lost consciousness briefly. Now I have a severe headache and I feel confused and disoriented.
I have severe abdominal pain that started suddenly 2 hours ago. The pain is 10 out of 10. I am vomiting and cannot stand up straight.
My face is drooping on one side, my arm feels weak and I am having trouble speaking. This started about 30 minutes ago.

expected_entities.functionalLimitation: facial droop, arm weakness, speech difficulty

patient_input: I can barely breathe. I'm an asthmatic and my inhaler is not working. I've used it 5 times in the last hour.
I have a very severe headache, high fever of 40 degrees, and my neck is so stiff I can barely move it. I'm also vomiting.
I am 35 weeks pregnant and I have sudden severe abdominal pain, heavy vaginal bleeding, and I feel faint.
I have chest pain and shortness of breath. I am also sweating heavily and feel nauseous.
I twisted my knee while running during a football match. I heard a loud pop and now my knee is very swollen and I cannot bend or straighten it.
I was in a car accident 1 hour ago. My neck hurts badly and I have tingling down both arms. I was wearing a seatbelt.
I have been vomiting blood. It looks like coffee grounds. I also have dark tarry stools and I feel very weak.
I fell off a ladder about 2 hours ago and landed on my right leg. My thigh is very swollen, bruised, and the bone looks like it might be sticking out slightly.
I have had hypertension for 10 years. Today I suddenly developed a very severe headache at the back of my head, blurred vision, and I feel dizzy.
I hurt my ankle playing basketball. I can't put any weight on it at all. The whole ankle is swollen and there is a lot of bruising already.
I have had a fever of 39 degrees for 3 days, severe cough with green phlegm, and now I'm starting to feel short of breath when I walk.
I have a sudden thunderclap headache — the worst headache of my life. It started instantaneously, rated 10/10. I have never had a headache like this.
My 4-year-old has a very high fever of 41 degrees, is breathing very fast, and her lips are turning blue.
I slipped on ice and fell hard on my wrist. My wrist is at a weird angle, extremely swollen, and I can't move my fingers properly.
I have severe right-sided abdominal pain that started around my belly button and moved to the lower right. It's 8/10 and I have a fever.
I have crushing chest pain, my left arm feels numb, I'm sweating a lot and I feel like something is very wrong.
I was knocked off my motorbike. My leg hurts very badly and I can't feel my feet. I can move my arms but not my legs.

expected_entities.functionalLimitation: cannot move legs, no foot sensation

patient_input: I've been wheezing badly for 2 hours and my reliever inhaler isn't working. I can barely complete a sentence without stopping to breathe.
My 78-year-old mother fell and hit her hip. She can't move her leg and says the pain is unbearable. Her leg looks shorter than the other one.
I have type 1 diabetes. I'm feeling shaky, very confused, sweating and I can barely stand. I haven't eaten since this morning.
I suddenly lost vision in my right eye about 30 minutes ago. There was no pain. The vision loss was total and sudden.
I have a high fever, chills, confusion, and low blood pressure. I feel like I might pass out. This started about 6 hours ago.
I was playing cricket and got hit by the ball on my head. I felt dizzy for a moment and now I have a headache. I did not lose consciousness.

expected_entities.mechanismOfInjury: ball impact to head during cricket

patient_input: I have sudden severe pain between my shoulder blades that tears through to my front. It came on suddenly and is the worst pain I have ever felt.
I was stung by a bee 5 minutes ago. My whole body is itching, I have hives, and my throat feels tight. I'm starting to have trouble breathing.
I feel generally unwell. I have a slight headache, some fatigue, mild stomach discomfort and I've been a bit nauseous. This has been going on for about a week.
I have severe lower back pain radiating to my groin. It comes in waves and it's a 9 out of 10. I've been vomiting from the pain.
My 6-year-old fell off the monkey bars at school and hit his head. He seemed fine initially but now he is vomiting and is very sleepy.
I fell and hit my chest on the corner of a table. Now every time I breathe in deeply I get a sharp stabbing pain in my ribs. It hurts to take a full breath.
Rolled my ankle during a football match and it hurts to stand.
I hurt my foot playing soccer and putting weight on it is painful.
I slipped while running and now I can barely walk. My ankle is really sore.
My ankle is paining a lot after I twisted it at practice. Cant really put weight on it.
Sprained my ankle playing basketball. Its swollen and I walked back home hobbling.
Got a crushing feeling in my chest that goes all the way up to my jaw. Started maybe 15 mins ago.
My chest hurts really bad and the pain shoots to my left shoulder. Im sweating alot.
Chest is very tight and i feel pressure like somethings sitting on it. arm feels weird.
I banged my head really hard when I fell. I was out cold for a bit and now I have a splitting headache and feel confused.
Hit my head on the floor after slipping. Went blank for a second. Got a bad headache and things feel foggy.
Terrible headache, really high fever and my neck is so stiff I cant turn it. Also been sick to my stomach.
Got the worst headache ever with a burning fever. Neck is stiff and the light is really hurting my eyes.
Chest pain and cant catch my breath properly. Feeling real dizzy and sweaty.
Tightness in chest. Short of breath even at rest. Feel sick to my stomach.
Sudden terrible pain in my stomach. Came out of nowhere. I'm bent double and cant stand up.
My speech has gone weird, my face feels droopy on one side, and my right hand is very weak. Just happened.
Cant speak properly, one side of my face isnt working, arm is like jelly. Came on suddenly.

expected_entities.functionalLimitation: facial asymmetry, arm weakness, speech impairment

patient_input: Hurt my knee badly in a football tackle. Heard a big pop. Knee blew up with swelling and I cant straighten it.
My knee gave way during a run. There was a snap sound and now its all swollen and I cant bend it properly.
Chest feels tight, hard to breathe fully, got a sore throat and a slight temperature. Been like this 4 days and getting worse.
Having trouble breathing, my chest is tight and my throat is scratchy. Mild temperature. Been going on almost a week.
High temp for 3 days. Coughing up green stuff. Now getting puffed just walking to the kitchen.
Bin sick for 3 days with a bad cough and high temperature. Starting to feel short of breath wen I move around.
My inhalers not working and im really struggling to breathe. Used it loads of times already.
Asthma is flaring up badly. Puffer isnt helping at all. Cant get enough air in.
My son got pneumonia months ago and never fully got better. Still coughing a lot and always tired.
Son had pneumonia 5 months back, antibiotics didnt clear it. Hes always exhausted and has a constant cough.
Got a really bad pain starting from my belly button and it moved to the right side. Feeling hot and the pain is horrible.
Belly pain that started around middle moved to lower right. Fever and its getting worse. Cant walk comfortably.
Was in a crash. Neck is killing me and both my arms feel tingly and numb. Seatbelt was on.
Road accident. Neck very sore. Arms are numb. Was wearing seatbelt but head snapped forward.
Throat is really red and scratchy and im short of breath. Im asthmatic and having to use my pump more and more.
Ate something with nuts and now my lips are swelling up and throat feels like its closing. Got a rash everywhere.
Think i had a reaction. After eating I came up in hives, throat got really tight and im struggling to breathe.
Im a diabetic and feeling really shaky and confused. Sweating a lot and cant stand properly. Didnt eat today.
Sore throat for a couple days, stuffy nose and body is aching all over. Mild stuff but annoying.
Woke up with a bad throat and blocked nose. Feeling a bit achy everywhere.
Ankle injury from basketball. Cant walk at all. Lots of swelling.
Done my ankle in playing sport. Whole foot has ballooned up and I can't take a step.
Got terrible pain in my back that goes into my groin. Coming in waves, really intense. Also been vomiting.
Lower back spasm and shooting pain into my private area. Coming and going in waves. Feeling sick.
Worst headache of my life hit me all at once. Never had anything like it. 10 out of 10 pain.
Extreme sudden headache out of nowhere. Like an explosion in my head. Never felt anything this bad before.
Elbow is swollen and warm and red. Also have achy body. It hurts to move the arm.
Threw up blood that looked like dark coffee. Feeling very weak and dizzy. Stools have been black.
Had a blood clot in my lung and chest infection. Now back and shoulder pain and it hurts every time I breathe.
My elderly mum tripped and fell. She cant move her hip and leg and the pain is awful. One leg looks shorter.
Last winter I had a really bad cough and couldnt breathe properly. Xray showed fluid. Now worried about it happening again.
A ball hit me on the head during a game. Felt woozy for a sec and now have a dull headache.
Got hit in the head by a cricket ball. Small dizzy spell then fine. Headache now.
Sons throat is very sore since last night. Has a high temperature I cant seem to bring down. Rest of family now feeling sick too.
Long-term high blood pressure patient. Sudden blinding headache at back of head and cant see properly. Feeling dizzy.
Started feeling ill last night. Got a runny nose and woke up with a headache. Nothing major.
Nose been runny since yesterday, bit of a headache coming on. Think Im getting a cold.
Slipped on wet floor and fell on my outstretched hand. Wrist is now bent weirdly and i cant move my fingers right.

expected_entities.mechanismOfInjury: fall on outstretched hand, wet floor

patient_input: Chest feels like its being squeezed. Left arm is numb. Breaking out in a cold sweat. Not feeling right at all.
Got type b flu and getting worse not better. Chest hurts and I can hear a rattling sound when I breathe. Pregnant.
Im 8 months pregnant. Suddenly got really bad cramps and started bleeding heavily. Feeling faint.
Got knocked off my bike. My legs feel dead and I cant move them. Arms are fine. Terrible pain in my lower back.
Fell and knocked my chest on a corner. Every breath hurts bad. Feels like my ribs are broken.
